Dialog.name: MSG_802_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}If you're being overwhelmed by the enemy's assault, protect yourselves by guarding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_802_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}When you guard, even if your weakness is struck, you can avoid being knocked down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_802_1_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 4}Try and make use of that in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_802_2_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 5}If you're being overwhelmed by the enemy's assault, protect yourselves by guarding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_802_2_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 5}If you're guarding, then even if your weakness is struck, you can avoid being knocked down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_802_2_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 5}Try and make use of that in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_802_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By guarding against an enemy attack, you can halve damage received.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_802_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Furthermore, you will avoid being knocked down, even if your weakness is struck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_802_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If an enemy is winding up for a powerful attack, or if you think your weakness will be targeted, try guarding to play it safe.[n]{f 1 1}
